---
name: 🐛 Bug Report
about: Create a report to help us improve DataPrime
title: "🐛 [Bug]: "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## 📝 Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## 🔁 Reproduction Steps

Steps to reproduce the behavior:

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

## 🎯 Expected Behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## 📸 Screenshots / Console Logs

If applicable, add screenshots or console output from the browser developer console (F12) to help explain your problem.

## 💻 Environment Details

- OS: [e.g. macOS, Windows]
- Browser: [e.g. Chrome, Brave]
- Extension Version: [e.g. 1.0.0]
- Amazon Domain: [e.g. amazon.com, amazon.co.uk]

## 💡 Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here.
